# AIBasecamp

> Free, friendly AI lessons for non-technical people, guided by Scout.

AIBasecamp.TV is the home of the AIBasecamp YouTube channel: a calm, beginner-first path for adults who feel behind on AI. Scout, a friendly bear guide, leads free video lessons and a free Starter Kit so you can use AI for real everyday tasks without jargon or tech skills.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://aibasecamp.tv/)
- [The problem](https://aibasecamp.tv/#problem)
- [How it works](https://aibasecamp.tv/#how)
- [Why it works](https://aibasecamp.tv/#why)
- [Free Starter Kit](https://aibasecamp.tv/#starter-kit)
- [Watch on YouTube](https://aibasecamp.tv/#watch)
